proposals.motive: Standardizing and clarifying documentation will help prevent setup errors and improve onboarding.
proposals.diff:
diff --git a/README.md b/README.md
--- a/README.md
+++ b/README.md
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ npm install
 
 # 3. Configurar .env
 cp .env.example .env
-# edita y rellena al menos: OPENAI_API_KEY (o OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
+# Edita y rellena al menos: OPENAI_API_KEY (o OPENROUTER_API_KEY)
 # y, si usas el cloud, OPENGRAVITY_URL + SHINOBI_API_KEY.
 
 # 4. Arrancar en modo dev (TypeScript directo)

proposals.motive: Removing redundant license declarations will clarify project legality and reduce confusion.
Improving audit report readability will enhance reliability and trust in security assessments.
proposals.diff:
--- a/audit-reports/README.md
+++ b/audit-reports/README.md
@@ -1,3 +1,7 @@
+# Audit Reports
+
+Ensure all sections are clearly formatted and readable.
+
 ## Current Findings
 
 List of current security findings and their status.
proposals.apply_error: error: audit-reports/README.md: No such file or directory

proposals.motive: Clarifying and organizing the 'misc/' directory will help avoid scope creep and improve project structure.
proposals.diff:
--- /dev/null
+++ b/misc/README.md
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+# Miscellaneous Directory
+
+This directory contains various auxiliary files and scripts.
+Ensure each file is documented and its purpose is clear.
+Organize files into subdirectories if necessary.

proposals.motive: Implementing error handling in testing scripts will reduce the risk of unhandled exceptions.
